steps.title: Close the inserted phrase
steps.content: The phrase a record label that was a pioneer of early hip hop music explains Sugar Hill Records. Because it interrupts the main sentence, it needs a closing comma before the main clause resumes with Chambers joined.

steps.title: Keep the main clause intact
steps.content: Choice B uses a semicolon, but the words before it are not an independent clause. Choice C adds which, creating an awkward relative clause. Choice D leaves the inserted phrase unclosed. The comma after music correctly marks the boundary. The answer is A.
